overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a sunset walk along the Night City waterfront promenade. The player character walks past palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers, views the beach and ocean at golden hour, then returns through a covered walkway with red arches.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade, passing benches and palm trees with futuristic skyscrapers rising on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera along the promenade path

entered.detail: futuristic red metal canopy structure with curved supports and glass roof
tall palm tree with detailed fronds lining the promenade
tall glass and steel building with neon signage and multiple levels
metal safety railing along the edge of the promenade overlooking water
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic waterfront promenade at golden hour. The camera walks forward along a concrete path lined with palm trees on the left and massive glass skyscrapers with neon signage on the right. A distinctive red arched canopy structure is visible to the right while the open sky dominates above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with beach access

events.description: exits the tree-lined promenade section into an open plaza area with direct waterfront views
sun becomes directly visible on the horizon, creating intense golden hour glare over the water

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfront edge to view the sunset over the ocean, turning slightly left toward the beach

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the plaza near the waterfront railing

entered.detail: sandy beach sloping down to the water with scattered debris
calm ocean surface reflecting the golden sunset light
brass-colored coin-operated telescope mounted on a pedestal for viewing the water

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open waterfront plaza with unobstructed views of the ocean and beach. The camera approaches a coin telescope viewer positioned at the railing's edge. The sun sits low on the horizon, casting long shadows and warm golden light across the concrete plaza and sandy beach below.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook with city skyline views

events.description: character turns around at the waterfront edge and begins walking back toward the covered promenade

agents.ego_description: turning away from the water and walking back along the promenade, viewing the distant city skyline across the bay

entered.detail: hazy silhouette of downtown skyscrapers visible across the water

segments.scene_description: At the waterfront's edge, the character turns and begins the return journey. The distant city skyline is visible through the haze across the water. The red arched canopy structure reappears in the distance on the right as the camera walks back along the concrete promenade, passing benches and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with red structural arches

events.description: enters the covered walkway with red arched supports and overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered promenade area, passing NPCs sitting at outdoor tables under the red arches

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs sitting at outdoor tables under the canopy

entered.detail: metal tables and chairs where NPCs are gathered under the covered walkway
futuristic vending kiosk with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a covered pedestrian arcade characterized by distinctive red arched supports and an overhead glass roof. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural sunset glow and artificial overhead lights. NPCs are seated at outdoor tables on the left, while futuristic buildings with glowing digital billboards rise in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a futuristic waterfront promenade that transitions from an open, sun-drenched plaza to a sheltered urban arcade. It begins by walking forward along a concrete path lined with palm trees and massive glass skyscrapers, with a red arched canopy visible to the right under a wide golden sky. As the camera reaches an open waterfront plaza, the view expands to reveal a sandy beach and the ocean with the sun sitting low on the horizon, pausing briefly near a coin telescope viewer at the railing's edge. The scene then shifts as the character turns back toward the city, passing benches and palm trees while the distant skyline looms through a warm haze. Finally, the movement leads into a covered pedestrian arcade where the natural sunset glow blends with artificial lights beneath a glass roof and red arched supports, passing NPCs at outdoor tables and glowing digital billboards.
